description: Golden dataset for evaluating news filtering. Cases 1-10 are the original set; cases 11-20 were added during the Milestone-5 prompt-tuning pass to make the metric more trustworthy. Cases 16-20 are deliberate 'used-with-AI but not about AI' traps (infrastructure, hardware, tooling) held out from the prompt to test whether the relevance rule generalises rather than memorises.

test_cases.title: GPT-4 Released by OpenAI
test_cases.summary: OpenAI announces GPT-4, their most advanced language model with improved reasoning and multimodal capabilities.

test_cases.title: New JavaScript Framework Released
test_cases.summary: Vue.js 4 brings improved performance and better TypeScript support.

test_cases.title: Machine Learning in Healthcare Breakthrough
test_cases.summary: Researchers use deep learning to predict disease outcomes with 95% accuracy.

test_cases.title: Docker 25 Released
test_cases.summary: Container platform adds new features for developers.

test_cases.title: Stable Diffusion 3.0 Improves Image Generation
test_cases.summary: New version of text-to-image model produces more realistic results.

test_cases.title: PostgreSQL 16 Features
test_cases.summary: Database adds JSON improvements and performance enhancements.

test_cases.title: Neural Network Optimizes Traffic Flow
test_cases.summary: City implements AI system to reduce congestion by 30%.

test_cases.title: Recipe for Perfect Pizza Dough
test_cases.summary: Chef shares secret technique for crispy crust.

test_cases.title: Transformer Architecture Explained
test_cases.summary: Deep dive into attention mechanisms and self-attention in modern NLP models.

test_cases.title: AI Ethics Guidelines Published
test_cases.summary: Organization releases framework for responsible AI development.

test_cases.title: Meta Releases Llama 4 Open-Weight Model
test_cases.summary: Meta launches Llama 4, an open-weight large language model with a longer context window and stronger multilingual support.

test_cases.title: Reinforcement Learning Agent Masters Robotic Assembly
test_cases.summary: A deep reinforcement learning system learns to assemble electronics with near human-level dexterity in a lab study.

test_cases.title: Diffusion Models Generate Synthetic Training Data
test_cases.summary: Researchers use generative diffusion models to create synthetic datasets that measurably improve downstream classifier accuracy.

test_cases.title: New Benchmark Tests LLM Mathematical Reasoning
test_cases.summary: A research group releases a benchmark suite for measuring reasoning ability and hallucination rates in large language models.

test_cases.title: AI System Detects Tumors in Radiology Scans
test_cases.summary: A convolutional neural network flags malignant tumors in CT scans earlier than radiologists in a clinical trial.

test_cases.title: Kubernetes 1.30 Released
test_cases.summary: The container orchestration platform adds improved autoscaling and security features for cloud-native workloads.
test_cases.reason: Infrastructure often used to deploy AI, but the article is not about AI (trap)

test_cases.title: NVIDIA Announces RTX 5090 Gaming GPU
test_cases.summary: The new flagship graphics card targets gamers with improved ray tracing and higher frame rates.
test_cases.reason: Consumer hardware; GPUs power AI but this article is about gaming (trap)

test_cases.title: AWS Cuts S3 Cloud Storage Prices
test_cases.summary: Amazon lowers object storage costs and adds new lifecycle management options for cloud customers.
test_cases.reason: Cloud infrastructure used by AI workloads, but not about AI (trap)

test_cases.title: Rust 1.85 Programming Language Released
test_cases.summary: The systems programming language ships async improvements and a faster compiler.

test_cases.title: Apache Kafka Adds Tiered Storage
test_cases.summary: The event-streaming platform introduces tiered storage to lower costs for high-throughput data pipelines.
test_cases.reason: Data-pipeline infrastructure that can feed AI, but not about AI (trap)
